title: ELFORDSON LED Gaming Chair with 8-Point Massage, Home Office Chairs with Head Pillow Lumbar Support, Video Game Chairs with Armrests Footrest, PU Leather, Black
features: 💺【𝐈𝐋𝐋𝐔𝐌𝐈𝐍𝐀𝐓𝐄 𝐘𝐎𝐔𝐑 𝐆𝐀𝐌𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐒𝐏𝐀𝐂𝐄】The ELFORDSON game chair offers 12 customizable RGB LED colors with up to 366 different modes to brighten up your gaming setup. With durable PU leather on top, and high-density foam inside, this sleek PC chair is an exceptional choice for those who demand style and comfort.

💺【𝐄𝐍𝐇𝐀𝐍𝐂𝐄𝐃 𝟖-𝐏𝐎𝐈𝐍𝐓 𝐌𝐀𝐒𝐒𝐀𝐆𝐄】Designed with 8-point massage and 5 different modes, the ELFORDSON racing chair is a perfect choice for reducing muscle fatigue and tension caused by extended gaming sessions. It also doubles as an excellent WFH partner for executives who work at home.

💺【𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐋𝐄 𝐅𝐔𝐍𝐂𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍𝐒】The chair is equipped with detachable neck and lumbar support, a backrest that can recline between 90°-150° with a built-in footrest, and 360° swivel casters, making it ideal for gaming, working, and relaxing. With a height of 82cm, seat height of up to 44cm, this chair can fit comfortably under most gaming desks or workstations.

💺【𝐃𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐁𝐔𝐈𝐋𝐃】The ELFORDSON gaming chair boasts a stylish nylon base with TUV-certified castors, Intertek approved fabric linen, and an SGS approved Gas-Lift system and tilt function that can support up to 180kg, providing you with an unparalleled level of luxury and stability.

💺【𝟏𝟎𝟎% 𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐒𝐅𝐀𝐂𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍 𝐆𝐔𝐀𝐑𝐀𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐄】This extra-large gaming chair comes with a 2-year warranty. If you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to contact ELFORDSON technical support, and we will respond within 24 hours to ensure your complete satisfaction.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Light up your game 2 Dynamic ergonomics 3 Innovative slide armrests 4 90°-150° recliner 5 Extra-large gaming chair No compromise on materials Quality universal castors, a smoothy experience Upgraded reinforced steel base Thickness: 2.3mm SGS-certified gas lift Heavy-duty nylon base Whole-piece molding foam An elite in quality and design, your solution to true comfort ELFORDSON Gaming Chair - Marc Series Maximum weight capacity 180kg Assembly Assembly required Package 1x Manual instruction; 1x Chair Note (i) All measurements are made manually with a possible deviation of 1-3 cm. Note (ii) Due to the screen and lighting configuration, the colours may be slightly darker or lighter. Note (iii) Armrests assembly instruction: Use a screwdriver to poke into the slanted nuts to straighten the nut, and then fasten the screw again. Previous page Next page 1 Marc series 2 Xavier series 3 Elite series
